login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Access your account
login.error.server: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.route_denied: You do not have access to this page. Redirecting to the dashboard.
auth.route_unknown: This URL is not registered. Redirecting to the dashboard.

favorites.limit: You can add up to 5 favorites.
favorites.home_not_allowed: The dashboard cannot be added to favorites.
favorites.not_page: Only page menus can be added to favorites.
favorites.menu_not_allowed: This menu is not allowed for your account.
favorites.already: This menu is already in favorites.
favorites.not_found: This menu is not in favorites.

error.session_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
error.login_failed: No matching account information was found.
error.account_not_active: This account cannot be used. Please contact an administrator.
error.login_grade_not_allowed: Your role is not allowed to sign in.
error.access_ip_not_allowed: Your IP address is not allowed to connect.
error.account_locked: This account has been locked after too many failed password attempts. Please contact an administrator.
error.internal: A temporary error occurred. Please try again later.
error.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
error.ERR_SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
error.ERR_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
error.ERR_ACCESS_IP_NOT_ALLOWED: Your IP address is not allowed to connect.
error.ERR_ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: This account cannot be used. Please contact an administrator.
error.ERR_LOGIN_GRADE_NOT_ALLOWED: Your role is not allowed to sign in.
error.ERR_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account has been locked after too many failed password attempts. Please contact an administrator.
error.ERR_INTERNAL: A temporary error occurred. Please try again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Save your preferences. Applied only to the logged-in account.

defaultCorporation.title: Default corporation
defaultCorporation.label: Default corporation
defaultCorporation.help: Used as the default corporation in the header after login.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep your current password.
profile.passwordComplexity: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a letter, a digit, and a special character (case insensitive for letters).
profile.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.password_max_length: Password must be at most 72 characters.
profile.password_require_letter: Password must include at least one letter.
profile.password_require_upper: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
profile.password_require_lower: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
profile.password_require_digit: Password must include at least one digit.
profile.password_require_special: Password must include at least one special character.
profile.password_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

modal.autoCdHint: Shipper code is assigned automatically as CORP- plus a 4-digit serial when you save.
modal.registerContinueSuccess: Registered as {{cd}}. You can enter the next shipper.

users.title: Users
users.duplicate_user_id: This user ID is already in use.

commonCode.title: Common codes
commonCode.searchPlaceholder: Search by main code or name

register.title: Register main category code
register.subCdRequired: Please enter a main category code.
register.dispSeqInvalid: Display order must be a number.

corporations.duplicate_cd: This shipper code is already registered.
corporations.serial_exhausted: Auto-numbering limit (CORP-9999) exceeded. Contact an administrator.
corporations.create_retry_exhausted: Could not complete registration due to repeated code conflicts. Please try again shortly.

menus.parent_system_mismatch: Parent menu must belong to the same system (OM/BO).

authGroups.code_required: Please check the auth group code.
authGroups.invalid_menu_ids: The request contains invalid menu IDs.
authGroups.duplicate_cd: This auth group code is already in use.
authGroups.code_invalid: Use uppercase letters, digits, and underscore only, up to 48 characters.

authGroupManage.deleteConfirmWithUsers:
All permissions assigned to users in this group will be removed.
Continue?

register.title: Register auth group
register.authGroupCdAuto: The system assigns the auth group code when you save.
register.success: Auth group created. Use Permissions or click the code in the list to configure menus and details.

menuManage.title: Menu management
menuManage.lead: Browse and edit the menu tree per system, and register child menus.
menuManage.selectHint: Select a menu in the tree.
menuManage.deleteConfirm: Delete the selected menu and all of its child menus. Continue?
